Description: Goddess of nature, represents the wild and primal forces of Krynn. Partner of Zivilyn.
God of wisdom, represents enlightenment and understanding. Partner of Chislev.
God of fire, passion, and alchemy. Represents change and transformation through creativity.
Goddess of neutral magic, patron of red-robed wizards. Focuses on balance and the mysteries of magic.
God of knowledge and balance, keeper of the Tobril, which contains the divine plan of the High God.
Goddess of interaction, trade, and commerce. Promotes enterprise and fair dealings.
God of creation, patron of dwarves and craftsmen. Created the world of Krynn and the Graygem.
